'''Sky City''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] located on the northernmost end of the continent of [[Landra]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. Of the two cities located on Landra—the other being [[Northwest]]—it was the oldest of the two.

{{City-stub}}
